word: H8238 - שְׁפַרְפַר - shᵉpharphar - shef-ar-far' - [idiom] very early in the morning

sections.paragraph: Short Definition: [idiom] very early in the morning

Original: שׁפרפר

Transliteration: shepharphar

Phonetic: shef-ar-far'

BDB Definition:

  1. dawn, early morning

Origin: from H8231

TWOT entry: 3046b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
